mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, ( SELECT COUNT(FILE_NUM) FROM FILES F WHERE F.IDX = B.IDX ) FILESCOUNT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD B
AND MENU_ID = #{ menu_id }
AND ${searchType} Like '%' || #{ keyword } || '%'
ORDER BY IDX DESC OFFSET #{ offset } ROWS FETCH NEXT #{ numOfRows } ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, REGDATE, HIT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(IDX),0)+1 FROM BOARD), #{menu_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, SYSDATE, 0 )

insert.foreach: INTO FILES VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_NUM),0) FROM FILES) + #{i} + 1, (SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM BOARD), #{file.filename}, #{file.fileext}, #{file.sfilename} )
